title: TWAS eQTL Source Confounding — Systematic Evaluation
description: Analysis scripts, processed data, and containerized reproducibility environment for: eQTL source selection systematically biases TWAS cross-population replication — quantitative evidence from HOTAIR binding proteins across 104 genes and three diabetic complications.
